params.assets: Amount of underlying assets to deposit
Amount of underlying assets to deposit
params.outputs: Array of Bitcoin outputs to include in the transaction

returns.frUsdAmount: The frUSD minted (held by contract until bridge completes)

params._asset: The underlying asset token (USDC or USDT)

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

params.newFeeBps: The new fee in basis points (max 100 = 1%)

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

params.assets: Amount of underlying assets to withdraw
params.owner: Address whose frUSD will be burned

params.amount: Amount of underlying asset to withdraw (gross amount before fee)

asset().notice: The underlying asset token (USDC or USDT)

authenticatedCall(bytes,uint256,bytes).notice: Executes an authenticated call with Schnorr signature verification

burnFrUSD(uint256).notice: Burns frUSD from a processed payment

convertToAssets(uint256).notice: Returns the amount of assets that would be withdrawn for given frUSD

convertToFrUSD(uint256).notice: Returns the amount of frUSD that would be minted for given assets

decimals().notice: Returns the underlying asset decimals (6 for USDC)

deposit(uint256,address).notice: Deposits assets and mints frUSD to receiver

depositAndBridge(uint256,bytes,(uint64,b.notice: Deposits assets and queues a bridge payment to Bitcoin

depositToStrategy().notice: Deposits all available assets to strategy

frUSD().notice: The shared frUSD token that both vaults mint

getPaymentOutputs(uint256).notice: Returns the outputs for a payment

getPaymentsLength().notice: Returns the total number of payments

pendingFrUSD().notice: Total frUSD held for pending payments

totalAssets().notice: Returns the total assets controlled by this vault

withdrawFees().notice: Withdraws collected fees to the fee recipient

withdrawFromBridge(uint256,address,bytes.notice: Withdraws assets from the bridge to a target address
